- Project Kick-off — 10:00–11:00 (conflicts with the preferred 10:00 time)

Because 10:00 is unavailable, would you like me to schedule the 1-hour follow-up at one of these alternate times on 2024-05-19?
- 09:00–10:00 (before the kickoff)
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after the one-on-one)
- 14:00–15:00 (afternoon)

Please confirm:
1) Which of the above times (or give another time on that day) you want.  
2) Participants to invite (emails), or should it be just you (calendar owner)?  
3) Title and a short description to use — I can use a suggested default:

   - Description: "Follow-up to review action items from the Project Kick-off. One-hour meeting."

4) Location or virtual meeting link (if needed).

Once you confirm these, I’ll create the event.
